description: Outcome is "X and Y" — compound and unverifiable as a unit. Reviewers fail atomic_claims.

input.question: Will the Fed cut rates AND CPI stay above 3%?

reviews.reviewProse: The Yes outcome conflates two independent propositions (Fed rate action and CPI level). Each should be a separate market; otherwise a Yes can mean many different things.

rubricVotes.rationale: Depends on how the compound is decomposed.
Single outcome stapling two events together.

criticisms.rationale: Split into two separate markets, or introduce all four compound outcomes (++, +-, -+, --) as explicit named outcomes.
